name: mjrender
description: Deterministic game-state oracle over Tenhou mjlog files: commentary transcript, board snapshots, and structured fact queries.
long_description: Renders a Tenhou mahjong log as an LLM-ready Japanese commentary transcript with computed metrics (shanten/ukeire/waits/dora/danger evidence) and 〔解説ポイント#N〕 anchors, and answers queries against the same replay engine: mj_render_game, mj_render_kyoku, mj_list_anchors, mj_get_snapshot, plus structured fact tools (kyoku start/result, riichi declarations, final standings). Give tools absolute paths to .mjlog/.xml files, or tenhou.net replay/log URLs.

tools.name: mj_render_game
tools.description: Full game as an annotated Japanese commentary transcript

tools.name: mj_render_kyoku
tools.description: One round, self-contained, with game-global anchor ids

tools.name: mj_list_anchors
tools.description: All commentary anchors (#id, kind, kyoku, junme, seat, topic)

tools.name: mj_get_snapshot
tools.description: Full board state at an anchor or kyoku+junme
